ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation observed in millimeters */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the city */,
  "nearest_weather_station" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest weather station */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., coastal, mountainous) */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion where the country is located */,
  "climate_description" TEXT /* General climate description of the country */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average annual temperature */,
  "average_precipitation" REAL /* Average annual precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time when the source was last checked */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the source was last updated */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the data source (e.g., global, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the category (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_categories" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., comma-separated, tab-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_creator FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the forecast */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature forecasted */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature forecasted */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature forecasted */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage forecasted */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness percentage forecasted */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed forecasted in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation forecasted in millimeters */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure forecasted in hPa */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility forecasted in meters */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "forecast_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_forecast_source FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the historical data is for */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the historical data */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage recorded */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness percentage recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation observed in millimeters */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the observation is for */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature observed */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature observed */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature observed */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage observed */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness percentage observed */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed observed in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation observed in millimeters */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure observed in hPa */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility observed in meters */,
  "observation_source" TEXT /* Source of the observation data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_observation_source FOREIGN KEY ("observation_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date and time of the last maintenance */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_data_collected" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data collection */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
